scene: Your master sends you across the city with a sealed message and more trust than usual.

choices.label: Deliver it swiftly and unread
choices.resultText: A coin for speed, and a notch more trust. Trust is the real currency here.

choices.label: Steam the seal and read it first
choices.resultText: Knowledge of a debt the master hides. Dangerous to hold, impossible to unknow.

scene: A dock slave whispers of a ship whose captain asks no questions, sailing at the dark of the moon.

choices.label: Your path is manumission, not flight
choices.resultText: Runaways are hunted. Freedmen are citizens-almost. You play the long game.

choices.label: Help him provision, stay yourself
choices.resultText: The ship sails with one more soul. You dream of dark water for a week.

scene: The household scribe falls ill. Someone must keep the accounts, and you have watched him for years.

choices.label: Volunteer your letters
choices.resultText: The accounts balance. The master looks at you differently - like an asset that appreciates.

choices.label: Stay silent - visible skill brings visible burden
choices.resultText: A hired scribe comes. Your letters remain your own secret savings.

scene: The new overseer beats the kitchen boy for a dropped amphora. The household holds its breath.

choices.label: Step between them
choices.resultText: You take one blow meant for the boy. The household remembers. So does the overseer.

choices.label: Report the overseer's thefts to the master instead
choices.resultText: You fight with the weapon you have: information. The overseer is sold by month's end.

scene: Market day. Your small permitted earnings - the peculium - could grow, or buy a rare comfort.

choices.label: Save every obol toward your price
choices.resultText: The buried jar grows heavier. Freedom has a number, and you know it to the obol.

choices.label: Buy wine and honey cakes for the quarter
choices.resultText: One evening where the quarter laughs like free people. Worth a month of the jar.

scene: A fellow slave is accused of stealing figs you saw the cook's son take.

choices.label: Speak the truth, against a free boy's word
choices.resultText: A slave's word against a citizen's son. Somehow, this time, yours holds. The quarter walks taller.

choices.label: Keep silent - the truth is not safe
choices.resultText: He takes the lashes. You learn the geometry of survival, and its price.

scene: Cleaning the andron after a symposium, you find a letter implicating your master in smuggling.

choices.label: Return it unread, seal intact
choices.resultText: He finds it exactly where it should be. His relief buys you a kindness.

choices.label: Copy it before returning it
choices.resultText: Insurance, buried beside the jar. May you never need it. May it work if you do.

scene: During the Kronia-like festival, masters serve and slaves feast. Yours plays along, mostly.

choices.label: Feast and speak freely, as the day allows
choices.resultText: For one day, your jokes land at the high table. Two of them are remembered all year.

choices.label: Use the loose day to map the household's secrets
choices.resultText: Wine loosens every tongue but yours. By nightfall you know who owes whom, and why.

scene: The master, in good humor after a profitable season, muses aloud about your price and the temple registry.

choices.label: Name your saved peculium then and there
choices.resultText: Before Artemis and two witnesses, the registry takes your name. Free. The word tastes like sea air.

choices.label: Smile, serve well, let the idea ripen
choices.resultText: Push a master and he remembers owning you. Wait, and he remembers liking you. The jar grows.

scene: The children's hired tutor notices you mouthing the lesson's Greek verses from the doorway.

choices.label: Accept his offer of quiet lessons
choices.resultText: Hesiod by lamplight, after the dishes. Slaves who read become freedmen who rise.

choices.label: Deny it - learning above your station draws eyes
choices.resultText: He shrugs and lets it go. The verses keep reciting themselves in your head anyway.
